subject: Two anime figures in a confrontational scene: a large bald figure in the foreground and a smaller uniformed figure behind, set in what appears to be an institutional interior
description: The framed card art shows two figures in an anime style. The foreground figure is large and bald, heavyset, with a formal bearing — facing slightly away from the viewer. The smaller figure behind them is wearing what appears to be a school or institutional uniform in blue, looking up at the larger figure. The scene has an interior setting with muted colors. The card name identifies the primary figure as Muraki from the Mob Psycho 100 franchise. The flavor text references accessories and purpose, suggesting a moment of condescension or confrontation.
foreground: Large bald figure in formal attire, viewed from behind
background: Smaller uniformed figure in blue, muted interior setting
emotion: imposing authority from the large figure; apprehension or defiance from the smaller one
